title: Radio Eva
wikitext:
[]: Radio Eva             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Sep 22, 2008 11:59 am Something new linked to the Eva Store site . I'm not sure just what it's for (promotional type things or does Gainax/Kara have anything to do with it?) but it seems interesting at any rate: http://radio-eva.jp/main.html

[]:             Quote Post by Sharaz Destler » Mon Sep 22, 2008 12:59 pm Sounds like a radio version of EVA to me...

[]:             Quote Post by IrkenEvangelion » Wed Sep 24, 2008 4:26 pm Awesome! I am liking that Sea of LCL shirt....

[]: Re: Radio Eva             Quote Post by pat457 » Thu Sep 25, 2008 6:18 am Sailor Star Dust wrote: Something new linked to the Eva Store site . I'm not sure just what it's for (promotional type things or does Gainax/Kara have anything to do with it?) but it seems interesting at any rate: http://radio-eva.jp/main.html

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Sep 25, 2008 3:21 pm I'll try to take a whack at it later today.

[]:             Quote Post by Shiro » Thu Sep 25, 2008 5:41 pm [EVANGELION] suki na otona no kansei ya shukou wo shigeki suru monodzukuri wo CONCEPT toshita PROJECT desu. Evangelion's liked adults' complete plan excites creation of a concept and with it a project. Rough, really shitty translation, but gets the point across.

[]:             Quote Post by cat42 » Sun Sep 28, 2008 8:04 pm Shiro wrote: Evangelion's liked adults' complete plan excites creation of a concept and with it a project. Rough, really shitty translation, but gets the point across.

[]:             Quote Post by master_lloyd » Mon Sep 29, 2008 9:31 am #All we hear is (*clap clap*) Radio Eva (*clap clap*) Radio Eva!# Sorry couldn't resist.

[]:             Quote Post by pat457 » Tue Sep 30, 2008 3:47 am Shiro wrote: Evangelion's liked adults' complete plan excites creation of a concept and with it a project. Rough, really shitty translation, but gets the point across.

[]:             Quote Post by Sharaz Destler » Tue Sep 30, 2008 7:51 pm pat457 wrote: Shiro wrote: Evangelion's liked adults' complete plan excites creation of a concept and with it a project. Rough, really shitty translation, but gets the point across.

[]:             Quote Post by pat457 » Wed Oct 01, 2008 6:54 am Sharaz Destler wrote: No, you silly person, it was translated by Manga Entertainment!

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Feb 02, 2009 6:55 pm Bump. Look, wallpapers: http://www.radio-eva.jp/design/index.html (Thanks to Ornette for pointing that link out.) And more stuff added to the main site: http://www.radio-eva.jp/main.html What I don't get is how those Rei Ayanami shoes are supposed to remind one of Rei. :confused:

[]:             Quote Post by drinian » Mon Feb 02, 2009 7:46 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: What I don't get is how those Rei Ayanami shoes are supposed to remind one of Rei. :confused:

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Thu Jul 30, 2009 2:51 pm I want this so bad, why is it $63?!

[]:             Quote Post by pat457 » Sun Aug 02, 2009 10:35 pm Axell wrote: I want this so bad, why is it $63?!
